name: nexusfi
description: NexusFi - Monorepo (Frontend, Backend, Soroban Contracts, Workflows)

scripts.dev: concurrently "yarn workspace frontend dev" "yarn workspace backend dev"
scripts.clean: yarn workspaces run clean && rm -rf node_modules
scripts.setup:hooks: cp scripts/pre-commit-secrets.sh .git/hooks/pre-commit && chmod +x .git/hooks/pre-commit && echo '✅ Pre-commit secret scanner installed.'
